summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Rhema Media System. Backend API and frontend login page working perfectly. All authentication endpoints properly protected, UI responsive and error-free.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (/api/) returns correct response
All 13 protected endpoints return 401 for unauthenticated requests
Content approvals CRUD endpoints properly protected
Login page loads correctly with fast performance (398ms)
Google Auth button present and clickable
Portuguese branding and content displayed correctly
Protected routes redirect to login properly
No error messages on login page
